title: Webinar: How to Automate Exposure Validation to Match the Speed of AI Attacks
description: AI-driven attacks uncovered in February 2026 automate kill chain and seize Domain Admin credentials in minutes, forcing faster defenses.

title: What to Look for in an Exposure Management Platform (And What Most of Them Get Wrong)
description: Integrated exposure platforms validate exploitability, correlate paths, and reduce priorities to 2%, improving enterprise risk reduction.

title: Critical cPanel Authentication Vulnerability Identified — Update Your Server Immediately
description: cPanel patches authentication flaw across supported versions, prompting Namecheap port blocks and temporary access limits.

title: CISA Adds Actively Exploited ConnectWise and Windows Flaws to KEV
description: CISA added two actively exploited CVEs to KEV after confirmed attacks, mandating FCEB patching by May 12, 2026.

title: LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 SQL Injection Exploited within 36 Hours of Disclosure
description: CVE-2026-42208 exploited within 36 hours of disclosure, exposing LiteLLM credentials, risking cloud account compromise.

title: Researchers Discover Critical GitHub CVE-2026-3854 RCE Flaw Exploitable via Single Git Push
description: CVE-2026-3854 (CVSS 8.7) enabled GitHub RCE via git push, risking cross-tenant access to millions of repositories.

title: Brazilian LofyGang Resurfaces After Three Years With Minecraft LofyStealer Campaign
description: LofyGang resurfaces with LofyStealer disguised as Minecraft hack, exfiltrating IBANs and passwords to 24.152.36[.]241, escalating gaming threats.

title: VECT 2.0 Ransomware Irreversibly Destroys Files Over 131KB on Windows, Linux, ESXi
description: VECT 2.0 destroys files over 131KB due to nonce flaw, launched December 2025, making ransom payments useless.

title: Why Secure Data Movement Is the Zero Trust Bottleneck Nobody Talks About
description: 84% of leaders say cross-network data sharing raises risk in 2026, as 53% rely on manual transfers, widening Zero Trust gaps.

title: Critical Unpatched Flaw Leaves Hugging Face LeRobot Open to Unauthenticated RCE
description: CVE-2026-25874 (CVSS 9.3) in LeRobot 0.4.3 allows unauthenticated RCE via pickle over gRPC, risking AI systems and sensitive data.

title: After Mythos: New Playbooks For a Zero-Window Era
description: AI models like Claude Mythos find vulnerabilities in minutes, collapsing patch windows and forcing assume-breach defenses to contain threats.

title: Chinese Silk Typhoon Hacker Extradited to U.S. Over COVID Research Cyberattacks
description: Chinese hacker extradited after 2020–2021 Exchange zero-day attacks on U.S. vaccine research, intensifying DOJ crackdown.

title: Microsoft Patches Entra ID Role Flaw That Enabled Service Principal Takeover
description: Agent ID Administrator enabled service principal takeover before April 9, 2026 patch, exposing privilege escalation risk in Entra ID tenants.

title: Microsoft Confirms Active Exploitation of Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202
description: CVE-2026-32202 actively exploited after April 27 advisory fix, exposing NTLMv2 hashes via zero-click SMB authentication.

title: Checkmarx Confirms GitHub Repository Data Posted on Dark Web After March 23 Attack
description: Checkmarx data surfaced after March 23, 2026 supply chain attack, prompting repository lockdown and investigation, raising exposure concerns.

title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: Fast16 Malware, XChat Launch, Federal Backdoor, AI Employee Tracking & More
description: This week’s ThreatsDay covers supply chain attacks, fake help desks, wiper malware, AI prompt traps, RMM abuse, phishing kits, and more.

title: Mythos Changed the Math on Vulnerability Discovery. Most Teams Aren't Ready for the Remediation Side
description: Claude Mythos’ April 7 launch accelerates vulnerability discovery, but limited access and rising false positives strain remediation workflows.

title: PhantomCore Exploits TrueConf Vulnerabilities to Breach Russian Networks
description: PhantomCore exploited three TrueConf flaws since September 2025, enabling remote access and lateral movement across Russian networks.

title: Researchers Uncover 73 Fake VS Code Extensions Delivering GlassWorm v2 Malware
description: 73 cloned VS Code extensions since Dec 21, 2025 fuel GlassWorm v2, installing cross-IDE malware and stealing credentials.

title: Fake CAPTCHA IRSF Scam and 120 Keitaro Campaigns Drive Global SMS, Crypto Fraud
description: Fake CAPTCHA IRSF scam sends up to 60 SMS messages since June 2020, exploiting 17 countries and costing victims $30 per attack.

title: Researchers Uncover Pre-Stuxnet ‘fast16’ Malware Targeting Engineering Software
description: Fast16 malware from 2005 predates Stuxnet by five years, targeting engineering software to sabotage calculations and reshape cyberwar history.

title: CISA Adds 4 Exploited Flaws to KEV, Sets May 2026 Federal Deadline
description: CISA adds 4 exploited CVEs including CVSS 9.9 SimpleHelp flaw, mandating FCEB mitigation by May 8, 2026 to reduce ransomware and botnet risk.

title: FIRESTARTER Backdoor Hit Federal Cisco Firepower Device, Survives Security Patches
description: FIRESTARTER backdoor hit Cisco ASA in Sept 2025, persists after patching CVE-2025-20333, risking continued federal network access.

title: NASA Employees Duped in Chinese Phishing Scheme Targeting U.S. Defense Software
description: NASA OIG exposed a 2017–2021 spear-phishing campaign by Song Wu, leading to DOJ charges and export control violations.

title: Bridging the AI Agent Authority Gap: Continuous Observability as the Decision Engine
description: AI agents inherit hidden authority from fragmented identities, creating a delegation gap that demands real-time governance.

title: 26 FakeWallet Apps Found on Apple App Store Targeting Crypto Seed Phrases
description: 26 FakeWallet apps since fall 2025 hijack crypto recovery phrases via Apple App Store China accounts, enabling wallet theft.

title: Tropic Trooper Uses Trojanized SumatraPDF and GitHub to Deploy AdaptixC2
description: Tropic Trooper used trojanized SumatraPDF and GitHub C2 in 2024 to deploy AdaptixC2, enabling covert VS Code tunnel access.

title: LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 Flaw Exploited Within 13 Hours of Disclosure
description: CVE-2026-33626 exploited within 13 hours of disclosure, enabling SSRF-based cloud credential theft and internal scanning.

title: UNC6692 Impersonates IT Help Desk via Microsoft Teams to Deploy SNOW Malware
description: UNC6692 targeted 77% senior employees between March 1–April 1, 2026, via Teams impersonation, enabling malware, data theft.

title: Bitwarden CLI Compromised in Ongoing Checkmarx Supply Chain Campaign
description: Bitwarden CLI 2026.4.0 was compromised via GitHub Actions in Checkmarx campaign, exposing secrets and distributing malicious npm code

title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: $290M DeFi Hack, macOS LotL Abuse, ProxySmart SIM Farms +25 New Stories
description: ThreatsDay Bulletin: active exploits, supply chain attacks, AI abuse, and stealth data risks observed this week.

title: [Webinar] Mythos Reality Check: Beating Automated Exploitation at AI Speed
description: AI-driven attacks collapse exploit windows, widening the patch gap and forcing faster vulnerability prioritization strategies.

title: Project Glasswing Proved AI Can Find the Bugs. Who's Going to Fix Them?
description: Mythos found decades-old vulnerabilities, yet fewer than 1% were patched, exposing a remediation gap.

title: China-Linked GopherWhisper Infects 12 Mongolian Government Systems with Go Backdoors
description: GopherWhisper infected 12 Mongolian government systems in January 2025, abusing Slack and Discord for C2, exposing wider espionage risks.

title: Vercel Finds More Compromised Accounts in Context.ai-Linked Breach
description: Vercel uncovered additional compromised accounts after expanding its probe into a Context.ai-linked breach, exposing OAuth and malware risks.
